name: test_create_child_record_from_consent_with_nhs_number[children0]
description:
Test: Create a new child record from an unmatched consent response with NHS number.
Steps:
1. Select a child from unmatched consent responses.
2. Click to create a new record and complete the process.
3. Verify the child is removed from unmatched responses.
4. Go to children page and verify activity log for the created child.
Verification:
- Created alert is visible.
- Consent response for the child is no longer visible in unmatched list.
- Activity log for the child shows the creation event.
descriptionHtml:
Test: Create a new child record from an unmatched consent response with NHS number.
Steps:

  1. Select a child from unmatched consent responses.
  2. Click to create a new record and complete the process.
  3. Verify the child is removed from unmatched responses.
  4. Go to children page and verify activity log for the created child.
    Verification:
  • Created alert is visible.
  • Consent response for the child is no longer visible in unmatched list.
  • Activity log for the child shows the creation event.
statusMessage: playwright._impl._errors.Error: Locator.is_visible: Error: strict mode violation: get_by_role("link", name="NAJIMALDIN, LETTY") resolved to 2 elements: 1) NAJIMALDIN, LETTY aka get_by_role("cell", name="Name and NHS number NAJIMALDIN, LETTY 944 930").get_by_role("link") 2) NAJIMALDIN, LETTY aka get_by_role("cell", name="Name and NHS number NAJIMALDIN, LETTY Not provided").get_by_role("link") Call log: - checking visibility of get_by_role("link", name="NAJIMALDIN, LETTY")
statusTrace: children = {: [Child(first_name='LETTY', last_name='NAJIMALDIN', nhs_number='9449307172', address=('FLAT 2'...example.org'), Parent(full_name='Melanie Johnson-Quinn', relationship='Mum', email_address='jonespaul@example.com')))]} children_page = consent_response_page = create_new_record_consent_response_page = dashboard_page = schools = {'HPV': [School(name='Rawdhatul Ilm Wal Huda', urn='149362', site=None), School(name='James Brindley School', urn='139...Mary's RC Primary School", urn='151110', site=None), School(name='Sunnymede Primary School', urn='114910', site=None)]} unmatched_consent_responses_page = @pytest.mark.parametrize( "children", [ { Programme.HPV: [ Child( patient.given_name, patient.family_name, patient.nhs_number, patient.address, patient.date_of_birth, 9, (Parent.get(Relationship.DAD), Parent.get(Relationship.MUM)), ) ] } ], ) def test_create_child_record_from_consent_with_nhs_number( children, children_page, consent_response_page, create_new_record_consent_response_page, dashboard_page, schools, unmatched_consent_responses_page, ): """ Test: Create a new child record from an unmatched consent response with NHS number. Steps: 1. Select a child from unmatched consent responses. 2. Click to create a new record and complete the process. 3. Verify the child is removed from unmatched responses. 4. Go to children page and verify activity log for the created child. Verification: - Created alert is visible. - Consent response for the child is no longer visible in unmatched list. - Activity log for the child shows the creation event. """ child = children[Programme.HPV][0] school = schools[Programme.HPV][0] unmatched_consent_responses_page.click_child(child) consent_response_page.click_create_new_record() create_new_record_consent_response_page.create_new_record() expect(unmatched_consent_responses_page.created_alert).to_be_visible() unmatched_consent_responses_page.check_response_for_child_not_visible(child) dashboard_page.click_mavis() dashboard_page.click_children() > children_page.verify_activity_log_for_created_or_matched_child(child, school) tests/test_consent_responses.py:174: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ mavis/test/pages/children.py:213: in verify_activity_log_for_created_or_matched_child self.search_with_all_filters_for_child_name(str(child)) mavis/test/pages/children.py:197: in search_with_all_filters_for_child_name if not child_locator.is_visible(): ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ .venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/playwright/sync_api/_generated.py:17198: in is_visible self._sync(self._impl_obj.is_visible(timeout=timeout)) .venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_locator.py:513: in is_visible return await self._frame.is_visible( .venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_frame.py:408: in is_visible return await self._channel.send( .venv/lib/python3.13/site-packages/playwright/_impl/_connection.py:69: in send return await self._connection.wrap_api_call( _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ self = cb = . at 0x7f294987ca40> is_internal = False, title = None async def testStage.description:
Test: Create a new child record from an unmatched consent response with NHS number.
Steps:
1. Select a child from unmatched consent responses.
2. Click to create a new record and complete the process.
3. Verify the child is removed from unmatched responses.
4. Go to children page and verify activity log for the created child.
Verification:
- Created alert is visible.
- Consent response for the child is no longer visible in unmatched list.
- Activity log for the child shows the creation event.
